ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients.text: nougat filling with no added sugar

ingredients_text: milk chocolate with no added sugar 50 % (sweetener: maltitols, whole milk powder, cocoa butter, cocoa paste, whey powder [from milk], emulsifier: lecithins), nougat filling with no added sugar 50 % (sweetener: maltitols, rapeseed oil, hazelnuts paste 5 %, whey [from milk], defatted milk powder, cocoa powder, emulsifier: lecithins, flavouring).
